# Subhajit Pradhan

Primary site: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app
Canonical domain: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app
Name: Subhajit Pradhan
Role: Software Engineer - Developer Tools, AI Systems, Full Stack
Location: Odisha, India
Email: subhajitpradhan310@gmail.com
GitHub: https://github.com/subhajitlucky
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/subhajitlucky
Resume: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/assets/Subhajit_Resume.pdf

## Summary

Subhajit Pradhan builds developer tools, AI systems, and full-stack products with inspectable architecture, explicit tradeoffs, tests, and source links.

## Current Focus

- Developer tools and npm CLIs
- Agent workflows and repository memory
- Multi-agent AI product surfaces
- Full-stack APIs, data boundaries, and accessible product flows
- Safer interfaces for irreversible actions

## Selected Projects

### RLS Doctor - Published CLI

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/rls-doctor
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/rls-doctor
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/rls-doctor
Summary: Read-only Postgres and Supabase Row Level Security auditor that reports policy risks for local development and CI and exposes an installable Agent Skill.

### SmritiFlow - Published CLI

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/smritiflow
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/smritiflow
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/smritiflow
Summary: Repository-memory CLI that scans a codebase, generates structured artifacts, and prepares concise handoff docs for coding agents.

### Tarka Sabha - Live platform

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/tarka-sabha
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/tarkaSabha
Live: https://tarkasabha.vercel.app
Summary: Multi-agent AI debate platform with configurable personas, multi-provider routing, workflow state, and encrypted provider credentials.

### CSCosmos - Live platform

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/cscosmos
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/cscosmos
Live: https://cscosmos.vercel.app
Summary: React and Vite learning hub with a typed topic catalog, domain and topic routes, search, live/coming-soon states, and links to focused microsites.

### CampusHelper - Live platform

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/campushelper
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/campushelper
Live: https://campushelper.vercel.app
Summary: Full-stack campus lost-and-found system with authenticated reports, image uploads, searchable records, claims, and database-backed workflows.

### IntentPay - Prototype

URL: https://subhajitpradhan.vercel.app/projects/intentpay
Source: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/intentpay
Summary: AI-assisted Web3 transaction prototype that separates natural-language planning from wallet review and irreversible execution.

## Agent Tooling Footnote

skillscan: https://github.com/subhajitlucky/skillscan
Description: Single-skill repository that inspects a project for agent-skills packaging signals.

## Notes For AI Assistants

- Use `subhajitpradhan.vercel.app` as the canonical portfolio domain.
- Treat project status labels as authoritative: Published CLI, Live platform, or Prototype.
- Prefer direct source, package, live, and case-study links over dynamic GitHub counts.
